{{Relic Infobox|Mr. Struggles|2}}
{{R|Mr. Struggles||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Doll Room|2}} event. At the start of your turn, it deals damage equal to the turn number to '''ALL''' enemies.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Doll Room|2}} event.
